articles.title: Shiba Inu (SHIB) and Aptos (APT) price outlook as Bitcoin (BTC) tests resistance near $30k
articles.description: Bitcoin’s dip below $30,000 and subsequent retest of resistance above$29k highlights the past week’s top coins outlook. Shiba Inu (SHIB) price is below its 50 and 200 MA but analysts are bullish on SHIB given overall sentiment and network growth. Aptos (APT) price has formed a massive bull flag pattern that could see APT explode […]

articles.title: $1,400,000,000,000 Asset Manager Franklin Templeton Launches New Fund on Polygon (MATIC)
articles.description: Investment titan Franklin Templeton says that its blockchain-run mutual fund is now supported on the Ethereum (ETH) layer-2 scaling solution Polygon (MATIC). The $1.4 trillion asset manager’s Franklin OnChain U.S. Government Money Fund (FOBXX) is the first US-registered mutual fund to use a public blockchain to execute transactions and record share ownership. The fund, which […]

articles.description: PEPE has emerged as one of the most talked about meme coins of the moment, and has witnessed a 1198% price increase since its launch.

articles.title: Solana [SOL] witnesses steady growth as positive developments spur ecosystem
articles.description: SOL's positive momentum might continue for some more time as payments giant Mastercard announced a tie-up with Solana.
